raw.objective: “To define the pharmacokinetic profile of CBZ in Chinese epileptic patients to facilitate the dosing schedule by non-linear mixed-effect modelling (NONMEM) analysis.”
raw.covariates: WT, Dose, Age>65y, and comedication of phenytoin, phenobarbital and valproic acid dose >18 mg/kg/day on CL, WT on Vd
raw.observations: Patients that reached serum concentrations below expected (1 mg/L) were excluded. Some bias and over-predictions of individual concentrations. Comparison table of clearances from other studies and their findings is provided, showing very similar PK across different ethnicities, except perhaps south africans.
raw.structure: 1 compartment, linear absorption and elimination separately done for CBZ and CBZE
raw.equations: CL/F=theta1*(Dose**theta2)*(WT**theta3) *(theta4**PHT) *(theta5**PHB) *(theta6**VPA) *(theta7**E)*(1+eta1) Vd/F=theta8*WT*(1+eta2) Ka=theta9 Cobs=Cipred+eps1 VPA=comedication with valproic acid >18 mg/kg/day (yes =1, no=0) PHT=comedication with phenytoin (yes =1, no=0) PHB=comedication with phenobarbital (yes =1, no=0) E=Age > 65 (yes=1, no=0)
raw.parameter_values: theta1=0.0734 theta2=0.406 theta3=0.694 theta4=1.45 theta5=1.17 theta6=1.21 theta7=1.91 theta8=0.849 theta9=1.2 omega1=0.0254 omega2=0.010 sigma1=0.975

extraction_target.title: Population pharmacokinetics of carbamazepine in Chinese epilepsy patients.

structural_model.description: 1 compartment, linear absorption and elimination separately done for CBZ and CBZE

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending
Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

sigma.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.residual_error: CL/F=theta1*(Dose**theta2)*(WT**theta3) *(theta4**PHT) *(theta5**PHB) *(theta6**VPA) *(theta7**E)*(1+eta1) Vd/F=theta8*WT*(1+eta2) Ka=theta9 Cobs=Cipred+eps1 VPA=comedication with valproic acid >18 mg/kg/day (yes =1, no=0) PHT=comedication with phenytoin (yes =1, no=0) PHB=comedication with phenobarbital (yes =1, no=0) E=Age > 65 (yes=1, no=0)
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.objective: “To define the pharmacokinetic profile of CBZ in Chinese epileptic patients to facilitate the dosing schedule by non-linear mixed-effect modelling (NONMEM) analysis.”

tested: phenobarbital and valproic acid dose >18 mg/kg/day on CL
covariates.raw: WT, Dose, Age>65y, and comedication of phenytoin, phenobarbital and valproic acid dose >18 mg/kg/day on CL, WT on Vd

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
